nasb.text: The priest shall offer them up in smoke on the altar as an offering by fire to the Lord; it is a guilt offering.

esv.text: The priest shall burn them on the altar as a food offering to the Lord; it is a guilt offering.

cnv.text: 然後把這些焚燒在祭壇上，作獻給耶和華的火祭，這是贖愆祭。

ccb.text: 祭司要在坛上焚烧这一切，作为献给耶和华的火祭。这是赎过祭。
